productScope.derivation: productScope(source) = sorted unique claim categories of all claims linked via SUPPORTS or CONTRADICTS; category parsed deterministically from claimId (clm-kz-mexc-<category>-NNN)
productScope.rejectionCondition: unparseable claimId category token -> stop without writing

countryScope.schemaFinding: market-source.schema.json has NO countryScope field; only scalar countryCode (string|null); additionalProperties:false
countryScope.resolution: countryCode constant "KZ" for all 16 sources; review countryScope arrays preserved verbatim per-source in qa-provenance (non-lossy); no arbitrary primary value chosen

schemaDecision2_linkagePlacement.model: market-source records contain source facts only; claim relationships live in separate claim-source-links.json registry; one record per claim/source/relationship
schemaDecision2_linkagePlacement.linkIdRule: <claimId>|<sourceId>|<relationship> (deterministic; extends Bybit claimId|sourceId precedent with relationship segment)

schemaDecision3_provenance.sidecar: qa-provenance.json (staging; no repository schema constraint; QA-only fields never placed into schema-constrained source records)
preserves: per-source verificationStatus, checkedDate, pageStatus, limitations, legalEntityScope, review countryScope arrays, sourceOrigin, verifiedEvidence, reviewNotes, statusMappingNote
per-claim originalStatement, verifiedStatement, verdict, confidence, correctionRequired, correctionNote, limitations, publication/ranking/cta/promo uses

representation.claimSourceLinks: 14 explicit CONTRADICTS records; all contradictingSourceIds preserved 1:1
representation.sourceRecords: remain factual; never globally downgraded for contradicting one claim; status derives only from own verification/page status
representation.qaProvenance: per-claim contradicting IDs verbatim; unresolvedEvidence verbatim
representation.normalizedConflicts: 7 records retain sourcesReviewed and unresolvedEvidence; terms-page flip explicit in cf-kz-mexc-terms-vs-regulator

sourceNormalizationDesign.output: normalized-sources.json (flat array sorted by sourceId; each record exact market-source.schema.json instance)

fieldMappings.url: verifiedUrl, deterministic fallback originalUrl (which-used recorded in provenance)
fieldMappings.sourceTier: TIER_A->A, TIER_B->B, TIER_C->C, TIER_D->D; unknown -> reject
fieldMappings.title: verbatim
fieldMappings.contentHash: null + provenance note (recovered package preserves no hashes)
fieldMappings.captureType: deterministic table: all 16 observed sourceType tokens -> HTML; sourceType verbatim in provenance; unmapped -> reject

statusMapping.VERIFIED_WITH_LIMITS: ACTIVE (justified: all six have live-current pageStatus; limits live in links + provenance) + mandatory statusMappingNote
statusMapping.OUTDATED: STALE (schema has no ARCHIVED) + mandatory note
statusMapping.CONTRADICTED: ACTIVE if pageStatus CURRENT_*-class else STALE; contradiction expressed via links, never via source status; + note + ownerReview flag

claimNormalizationDesign.output: claim-review.json (staging-only; 24 records; no repository schema applies; not canonical)
claimNormalizationDesign.correctionApplicationPolicy: corrections recorded, never applied; no legacy GEO text rewritten by staging; verified statement is future editorial source of truth; original preserved verbatim for audit
claimNormalizationDesign.originalVersusCorrectedPreservation: both statements verbatim side-by-side in every record
claimNormalizationDesign.statusEnumMapping: review verdicts kept verbatim; no coercion into any schema enum
claimNormalizationDesign.ownerReviewFlags: true where correctionRequired true, verdict UNVERIFIED, or claim referenced by a PARTIALLY_RESOLVED conflict
rejectionConditions: record count != 24
missing any of the 14 review fields
unknown verdict token
dangling source reference
correction count != 15

conflictNormalizationDesign.output: normalized-conflicts.json (7 free-form records, Bybit-precedent shape, sorted by conflictId)
conflictNormalizationDesign.restrictionEventSchemaReason: checked per-record: required eventId/eventType/detectedDate/reviewStatus + additionalProperties:false do not accommodate conflict fields; no record conforms; none forced

candidateMetadata.secondaryLabel: MEXC’s current terms list Kazakhstan as a prohibited jurisdiction

candidateDesign.schemaMismatch: NONE — productStatuses accepts arbitrary string keys and values; every dictated product key and status token is representable exactly; no safe-projection fallback needed

sourceTruthReview.finding: Kazakhstan present; displayed document update date remained 2025-05-29

locations: recheck schedule: cell.nextReviewDate 2026-08-21 (checkedDate + 30 days) + production-publication recheck provenance note

futureStagingFiles.purpose: run identity, package hashes, generated-file hashes, counts, stagingOnly:true, all authorization flags false
OPTION A non-production candidate; cell validated against exchange-market-cell.schema.json

claimSourceLinks.derivationMethod: sum of claim-verdicts verifiedSourceIds (41) + contradictingSourceIds (14); 0 duplicate triples; forward set verified equal to reverse index from source-verification supportedClaimIds/contradictedClaimIds; future implementation must recompute both directions and require set equality and count 55

rejectionConditions: package hash differs from f7658b5f… or bytes differ from 27833
package identity differs (project/country/exchange/batch/task/baselines)
any JSON fails to parse
expected source/claim/conflict ID set differs
duplicate ID exists (source, claim, conflict, linkId)
dangling reference exists (including forward/reverse link asymmetry)
source status cannot be safely mapped by the status decision table
product status cannot be represented without an owner-approved mapping
candidate cell fails exchange-market-cell.schema.json validation
any mandated provenance item would be lost
terms-page flip monitoring data would be lost
output path already exists without overwrite authorization
any write would touch production, canonical data/market-intelligence/**, legacy GEO, src/**, or schemas
counts or distributions drift from expected values
empty derived productScope
unknown enum token (tier, language, sourceType, verdict, conflict status)
